Just now

--

Geralt (Pixabay)You think the AI bubble is bursting? The AI revolution already happened and it WON!
AI is not just about chatbots and image generators, it’s about efficiency, reliability and profitability.
Whilst we might look at companies like OpenAI or Anthropic and view their financial losses as a victory over AI implementation — we’re actually missing the silent winners.
Companies like Palantir and ServiceNow are seeing massive growth in annual revenue up to 85% in fact.
Predictive AI
Many people think Midjourney, ChatGPT, Claude and Grok is AI.
The truth is that these are merely ‘hype’. The fun, entertaining part of AI. The money is actually in predictive AI. The kind of AI that is powering companies software and workflows.
For example, AI has been in widespread use across the hospitality industry for a long time. It’s easier to have AI manage your stock orders than it is to train up new staff with all of the weekly and seasonal information they would need to effectively manage deliveries.
Hospitality has a high staff turnover, about 60% per year. If you are in charge of a large restaurant chain in this economy, you can’t afford to rely on new staff to…
